title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
summary: Z AI launched Z Code, a Codex-like coding agent designed for GLM models with a free tier offering 5 million tokens daily. The tool supports project generation, previewing, element inspection, DevTools, and remote platform integration, though it lacks file explorer, changelog view, and git initialization features.
writeup: The video covers Z AI's launch of Z Code, a Codex-like coding agent built for GLM models, with a free tier providing 5 million tokens daily. It demonstrates the tool's capabilities: project generation, previewing, element inspection, DevTools, and remote platform integration. It also notes current gaps, namely the absence of a file explorer, changelog view, and git initialization. The free token allowance and GLM-specific design are the main points for anyone evaluating coding agents.
